title: Byakuya Kuchiki Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of the character Byakuya Kuchiki from Bleach.
body:
A fabric sky box sky overlay for the character Byakuya Kuchiki from the anime "Bleach" surrounded by his signature pink petals. 

The mod **FabricSkyBoxes is REQUIRED to use this.** Works for at least 1.21.x and has not been tested on lower versions. 

![Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9f2d67225b56c089543cf419be9cccaaa950b4b_0.webp)
